wins: Dream Team agent identity system working — After 3 rounds of debugging, all 4 agents (Coach/Lebron/Bronny/Curry) now correctly load personality + rules via `workspace/AGENTS.md`. Root cause found: sub-agents only inject AGENTS.md from workspace, not SOUL.md from agentDir.

Comprehensive SOUL.md + AGENT.md audit — Coach (pm-agent) produced detailed cross-agent review with 9 priority fixes, covering handoff gaps, escalation protocols, quick-fix sync, integration testing gaps. Actionable and thorough.

tu-vi release closure (carried from 3/22) — Git commits landed: `d185acd0` (release docs + backend verification), `6974fff0` (/ask query-question compatibility + README refresh). All hard verification surfaces green.
problems: CEO violated own execution boundary — Mini Taisama (CEO) built retro template, coded HTML dashboard site, and created cron jobs manually instead of dispatching to Coach → Lebron/Bronny. Dream Team runbook explicitly says CEO does NOT do implementation.

Premature retro cron without valid flow — Created 23:59 retro cron that runs in isolated session with no access to agent feedback. Retro requires multi-agent ping-pong, not single-agent hallucination.

Sub-agent injection took 3 debugging rounds — 3 rounds × 4 agents × 2 spawns = ~24 wasted sub-agent calls before discovering `workspace/AGENTS.md` is the injection point, not `agentDir/AGENTS.md`. Should have read docs first.

actionItems.action: Kill premature retro cron jobs (23:59 + dashboard) and redesign retro flow: Coach initiates → agents ping each other → synthesize
Apply top 3 priority fixes from Coach's cross-agent audit: (a) Curry escalation protocol, (b) Bronny design handoff checklist, (c) Curry automation stance clarification
Complete Codex OAuth login — run `openclaw models auth login --provider openai-codex` on Mac mini terminal directly (interactive TTY required)

wins: Retro cron system operational — The 23:59 daily retro cron fired successfully for the first time, proving the automated retrospective pipeline works end-to-end.
Yesterday's retro captured actionable insights — 3 action items from 3/23 retro were clearly defined with owners and deadlines. CEO execution boundary violation was honestly documented.
pkm-auction domain structure established — Retro template, daily folder, and site dashboard created on 3/23. Infrastructure is ready for daily operations.
problems: No Dream Team activity logged today — Midnight retro fired before any work happened. No coding sessions, no agent spawns, no task cards for 3/24.
Yesterday's 3 action items unresolved — None of the 3/23 action items have been marked as completed: (a) retro cron redesign, (b) Coach audit fixes, (c) Codex OAuth.
Retro site still uses mock data — The dashboard at `retro/site/index.html` has hardcoded sample data, not connected to actual daily retro files.

actionItems.action: [CARRIED] Redesign retro flow — Current cron runs in isolated session, can't ping agents. Options: (a) keep single-agent retro but make it data-driven from daily files, or (b) Coach initiates multi-agent retro in main session. Decide by 8:30 AM.
[CARRIED] Apply top 3 Coach audit fixes — (a) Curry escalation protocol, (b) Bronny design handoff checklist, (c) Curry automation stance clarification
[CARRIED] Complete Codex OAuth — Run `openclaw models auth login --provider openai-codex` directly on Mac mini terminal (interactive TTY required)
[NEW] Connect retro site to real data — Replace hardcoded `RETRO_DATA` in `index.html` with a data loader that reads from `daily/*.md` files or a generated `data.json`
[NEW] Issue first pkm-auction task card — Coach should create the first real task card for pkm-auction development. Team is configured but has zero shipped work on this domain.

agentNotes.coach: Has 2 carried action items from 3/23 that need attention
agentNotes.bronny: New action item — connect retro site to real data

lessons.title: Tiny task card giúp giảm loạn scope.
lessons.body: Tiny task card giúp giảm loạn scope.

lessons.title: Scope phải freeze trước khi coding.
lessons.body: Scope phải freeze trước khi coding.

lessons.title: Curry nên test theo contract cố định, không test theo target đang đổi.
lessons.body: Curry nên test theo contract cố định, không test theo target đang đổi.

lessons.title: Retrieval tuning cần golden query set sớm.
lessons.body: Retrieval tuning cần golden query set sớm.

lessons.title: Artifact-first handoff tốt hơn full-history forwarding.
lessons.body: Artifact-first handoff tốt hơn full-history forwarding.

lessons.title: Phase 1 phù hợp với Dream Team nếu triển khai như runtime guardrail vô hình.
lessons.body: Phase 1 phù hợp với Dream Team nếu triển khai như runtime guardrail vô hình.

lessons.title: Tool-output compaction hợp với Dream Team vì giảm noise/context bloat.
lessons.body: Tool-output compaction hợp với Dream Team vì giảm noise/context bloat.

lessons.title: Artifact storage chỉ nên là phụ trợ tự động, không biến thành thủ tục.
lessons.body: Artifact storage chỉ nên là phụ trợ tự động, không biến thành thủ tục.

lessons.title: Chunk budgets hợp nếu để rộng tay và checkpoint thưa.
lessons.body: Chunk budgets hợp nếu để rộng tay và checkpoint thưa.

lessons.title: Hai failure mode cần nhớ cho long-run: context truncation/compaction và runtime timeout.
lessons.body: Hai failure mode cần nhớ cho long-run: context truncation/compaction và runtime timeout.

lessons.title: Default operating modes: `Solo`, `Build`, `Release-critical`; `Build` là mode mặc định, `Release-critical` chỉ cho high-blast-radius work.
lessons.body: Default operating modes: `Solo`, `Build`, `Release-critical`; `Build` là mode mặc định, `Release-critical` chỉ cho high-blast-radius work.

lessons.title: Codex/default coding rule: chỉ giao coding executor khi Coach đã freeze tiny task card; không ném vague product ask thẳng cho coding agent.
lessons.body: Codex/default coding rule: chỉ giao coding executor khi Coach đã freeze tiny task card; không ném vague product ask thẳng cho coding agent.

lessons.title: Token rule: không forward full history mặc định, không duplicate cross-role analysis, và không spam progress update nếu state chưa đổi.
lessons.body: Token rule: không forward full history mặc định, không duplicate cross-role analysis, và không spam progress update nếu state chưa đổi.

lessons.title: Communication rule: prompt/update giữa Coach, Lebron, Curry phải gãy gọn, ngắn, on-point.
lessons.body: Communication rule: prompt/update giữa Coach, Lebron, Curry phải gãy gọn, ngắn, on-point.

lessons.title: Dev retro: với coding slice phức tạp, freeze tiny DoD + response contract trước; Coach hand tiny spec + acceptance tests; Curry validate theo contract cố định.
lessons.body: Dev retro: với coding slice phức tạp, freeze tiny DoD + response contract trước; Coach hand tiny spec + acceptance tests; Curry validate theo contract cố định.

lessons.title: Retrieval retro: tạo small golden query set trước khi tune parser/scorer/fallbacks.
lessons.body: Retrieval retro: tạo small golden query set trước khi tune parser/scorer/fallbacks.

lessons.title: QA retro: backend/UI contract change cần ít nhất 1 pinned API contract test và 1 representative fixture/render check.
lessons.body: QA retro: backend/UI contract change cần ít nhất 1 pinned API contract test và 1 representative fixture/render check.

lessons.title: Diagnosis retro: nếu chất lượng câu trả lời kém, phân loại miss theo `parser` vs `scorer` vs `corpus-quality` trước khi sửa code.
lessons.body: Diagnosis retro: nếu chất lượng câu trả lời kém, phân loại miss theo `parser` vs `scorer` vs `corpus-quality` trước khi sửa code.
